commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=17f8e9cb8de598b60627fa22fab7524a8d568273)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a prompt-image loading gate and declared attachment-block parsing, passes that gate as disabled from the embedded runner, reclassifies no-delivery external aborts as non-deliverable errors, and adds focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the introduced regression by source inspection: the PR passes `includePromptRefImages: false` for all embedded attempts while current main loads prompt refs from the current prompt. The original Telegram/Azure failure is plausible but not proven with real runtime evidence in the PR.
commands.review_followup: This needs contributor-visible revision and real behavior proof before merge; ClawSweeper should not queue a repair while the external PR is missing required after-fix proof.

target.title: fix(agent): ignore stale prompt image refs in fallback turns
target.body:
## Summary
- skip historical prompt image refs when loading images for embedded attempts so stale Telegram/context refs cannot poison text-only follow-up turns
- keep explicit current-turn attachment refs loadable
- classify externally aborted attempts with no visible text/tool/message side effect as non-deliverable errors instead of success
- add regression coverage for stale image ref skipping and aborted fallback classification

## Verification
- `timeout 300 pnpm vitest src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt-trajectory-status.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/images.test.ts`
  - 3 test files passed
  - 91 tests passed

## Root cause
Telegram image history from earlier context was being reloaded into later text-only fallback prompts, causing Azure Foundry to reject the request with `400 Invalid base64 image_url`. A later fallback abort could then be misclassified as success despite no user-visible delivery.
target.author: markus-lassfolk

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
